tests.details: current_phase remained 0 after gate passed; no script auto-advances .current_phase. Confirms U-D still open.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all PHASE1_STEPS, run check-phase-gate.sh, observe current_phase still 0 in .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: Some script should advance .current_phase from 0 to 1 (and 1 to 2) after the gate passes and approval is logged
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays at 0; advancement requires manual jq edit. Same behavior as prior sweep (U-D).

documentation_gaps.gap: process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1 from the Commands list (it appears in the Processes line indirectly but is not listed alongside --start-phase3 / --start-phase4)

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1' after --start-feature

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 6 BUILD_LOOP_STEPS completed sequentially (with stub test/src/security-audit artifacts)

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): ...' succeeded after all 5 build-loop steps + test-gate.sh --record-feature

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message 'feat(...)' returns rc=1 with no active build-loop. Direct shell `git commit` (no PreToolUse) bypasses — that is U-C and still open.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, build_loop state was reset to {feature:null, step:0, steps_completed:[]}. PR #17 fix verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: After scripts/pending-approval.sh --offer ..., piping a PreToolUse JSON envelope to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh emits permissionDecision=deny with message containing the pending question. PR #16 verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: After scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve, the same hook invocation no longer denies (passes through with empty stdout, rc=0).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed in .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1'

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct git commit bypasses BL-006 gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: With no active build_loop, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` directly in shell.
framework_bugs.expected: Commit-msg hook (or some sibling git hook) should reject feat: commits when no Build Loop is recorded.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds (returns rc=0, commit lands). Only the in-band PreToolUse hook (--check-commit-message) blocks; direct git execution is unguarded.

framework_bugs.summary: U-L confirmation: verify-init non-idempotent / under-stubs phase2_init
framework_bugs.reproduction: Run scripts/process-checklist.sh --verify-init in fresh project; observe it auto-completes 3 steps and warns; --check-commit-ready then still fails until phase2_init:initialization_verified is also marked manually.
framework_bugs.expected: verify-init either completes all auto-detectable phase2_init steps end-to-end, or explicitly directs the user to mark initialization_verified.
framework_bugs.actual: verify-init auto-marks 3 of 7 steps and exits OK; the user must run separate --complete-step calls for the remaining 4 steps including the synthetic 'initialization_verified' step. Same behavior as U-L in prior sweep.

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh requires 'steps' to be a single newline-delimited string; if it is a JSON array (the natural form), the linter checks the literal '[' as the first line and fails 'state-restatement' check.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh:122 — STEPS=$(... .steps) without unwrapping array; expected schema not documented in the framework

documentation_gaps.gap: phase2_init step 'initialization_verified' is a synthetic state-flip with no artifact; users discover it only by exhaustively trying step names (3 of the 4 unverified steps surfaced by --verify-init use names that are not in PHASE2_INIT_STEPS — 'backup_restore_tested', 'ci_runs_clean' fail with 'Unknown step').
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/process-checklist.sh PHASE2_INIT_STEPS vs verify-init's auto-marked names — names diverge

summary: Section A-E + G all green for base/private_poc/desktop/full/rust. Confirmed two known-open prior-sweep bugs at Medium severity (U-D phase advancement, U-C direct-git BL-006 bypass, U-L verify-init partial). PR #16 BL-015 sentinel, PR #17 helper copies + grace-window reset, PR #18 framework-self guard, PR #19 --non-interactive all verified working.
